scripts.build: npm run build:kart && npm run build:party && npm run build:fruity && npm run build:coop && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist dist/kart dist/party dist/fruity dist/coop dist/models dist/textures && cp index.html wideass-tats-game-arena.html NOTICE dist/ && cp -r css js assets dist/ && cp -r public/* dist/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/* dist/kart/ && cp -r party-game/dist/* dist/party/ && cp -r fruity-game/dist/* dist/fruity/ && cp -r frontend/dist/* dist/coop/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/models/* dist/models/ && cp -r kart-game/dist/textures/* dist/textures/
scripts.build:coop: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:kart: cd kart-game && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:party: cd party-game && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:fruity: cd fruity-game && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx --yes wrangler deploy
